sections.paragraph:
Original: עפני

Transliteration: ‛ophnı̂y

Phonetic: of-nee'

BDB Definition:

Ophni = "mouldy"
  1. a town of Benjamin located 2.5 (4.5 kilometers) miles northwest of Bethel; modern 'Jifna'

Origin: from an unused noun [denoting a place in Palestine]

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
